Event: Royal Challenge - Season 32
Event Date: 01/12/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: RI34
Night Pearl Ring

Once in a while, the unit fires a magic projectile at a random enemy. The projectile bounces up to 3 times. On hit, the projectile tears through the target's armor. When the enemy's armor is torn, that enemy takes 150000 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 25% for 5 sec. Also, that enemy takes 500000 physical damage over 5 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
